narrative:
Caesarscreek township has 882 registered voters, with 43.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 49.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 42.3 percentage points.
